caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" written in gold lettering, and a gold watch on his wrist is seated in a studio setting. He wears large black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional silver microphone mounted on a boom arm. To his left, a white banner displays the words "UNION HUSTLE" repeatedly, separated by gold stars. Behind him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black box and a black container with red and white text that says "TALK OUT" are visible on the table in front of him. The man remains in a seated position, gesturing slightly with his hands as he speaks. There is very little movement across the frames, with the scene remaining static while the man continues his conversation.
